
Length Compositions {data-navmenu="Fits to Data"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Time-Averaged Fits

```{r len_avg_grid}
len_fleets <- unique(mv$len_comp_fits$fleet)
len_sexes  <- unique(mv$len_comp_fits$sex)
fc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = len_fleets)

plot_list <- list()
for (fl in len_fleets) {
  for (sx in len_sexes) {
    sub <- mv$len_comp_fits[
      mv$len_comp_fits$fleet == fl &
        mv$len_comp_fits$sex == sx,
      , drop = FALSE
    ]
    if (nrow(sub) == 0) next

    avg_obs <- tapply(
      X = sub$obs, INDEX = sub$length,
      FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE
    )
    avg_pred <- tapply(
      X = sub$pred, INDEX = sub$length,
      FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE
    )
    avg_lens <- as.numeric(names(avg_obs))

    lbl <- if (length(len_sexes) > 1) {
      paste(fl, "-", sx)
    } else {
      fl
    }

    p <- plot_ly()
    # Observed: grey bars
    p <- add_bars(
      p = p,
      x = avg_lens, y = as.numeric(avg_obs),
      marker = list(
        color = "rgba(180,180,180,0.6)",
        line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
      ),
      showlegend = FALSE,
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        "Len %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra>Obs</extra>"
      )
    )
    # Predicted: coloured points + line
    p <- add_lines(
      p = p,
      x = avg_lens, y = as.numeric(avg_pred),
      line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 1.5),
      showlegend = FALSE,
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        "Len %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra>Pred</extra>"
      )
    )
    p <- add_markers(
      p = p,
      x = avg_lens, y = as.numeric(avg_pred),
      marker = list(
        color = fc[fl], size = 4,
        line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
      ),
      showlegend = FALSE,
      hoverinfo = "skip"
    )

    lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
    lay$annotations <- list(
      mv_top_label(label = lbl)
    )
    lay$barmode <- "overlay"
    p <- do.call(
      what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
    )
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p
  }
}

ncol_grid <- length(len_sexes)
nrow_grid <- max(1, length(plot_list) %/% ncol_grid)
p_out <- subplot(
  plot_list,
  nrows = nrow_grid,
  shareX = TRUE, shareY = TRUE,
  margin = 0.05
)
p_out <- layout(
  p = p_out,
  annotations = list(
    mv_bottom_label(label = "Length"),
    mv_left_label(label = "Mean proportion")
  )
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
```

### Residual Bubbles

```{r len_resid_bubble}
if (!is.null(mv$len_comp_resids)) {
  resid_plots <- list()
  for (fl in len_fleets) {
    sub <- mv$len_comp_resids[
      mv$len_comp_resids$fleet == fl,
      , drop = FALSE
    ]
    if (nrow(sub) == 0) next
    p <- mv_plot_bubble(
      df    = sub,
      x_col = "year",
      y_col = "length",
      title = fl
    )
    resid_plots[[length(resid_plots) + 1L]] <- p
  }
  if (length(resid_plots) == 1L) {
    resid_plots[[1]]
  } else {
    htmltools::tagList(resid_plots)
  }
}
```

### Yearly Fits

```{r len_yearly_grid}
plot_list <- list()
for (fl in len_fleets) {
  for (sx in len_sexes) {
    sub <- mv$len_comp_fits[
      mv$len_comp_fits$fleet == fl &
        mv$len_comp_fits$sex == sx,
      , drop = FALSE
    ]
    if (nrow(sub) == 0) next
    lbl <- if (length(len_sexes) > 1) {
      paste(fl, "-", sx)
    } else {
      fl
    }
    p <- mv_plot_comp_grid(
      df      = sub,
      bin_col = "length",
      ylab    = "Proportion"
    )
    p <- layout(p = p, title = lbl)
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p
  }
}
if (length(plot_list) == 1L) {
  plot_list[[1]]
} else {
  htmltools::tagList(plot_list)
}
```
